_readme: Only the true data gap: aircraft flown between logbook-historical.csv's coverage (2017-2023) and the current LogTen-tracked program in logbook.txt (Mar 2026+). CE-172-S and DA-42 were flown in 2024-2025 but never exported to either file. Sub-category fields (xc/dual/etc) are best-effort reads from a Propel Application PDF print, not verified against raw LogTen data like everything else in propel.json — treat with lower confidence. Remove an aircraft from here if you add a fuller export that covers it.
